channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Domestic fly tip left by bin in park, 10th March
item.description:
I noticed this by the bin today.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Otford Close, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed left near garages, 10th March
item.description:
It's been here for at least 2 weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hither Farm Road, Kidbrooke

item.description:
These items have been left for the past week or so.

item.description:
This has appeared this week.

item.title: Dead fox opposite shop, 10th March
item.description:
Dead fox on the path opposite the corner shop on Inverine Road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Inverine Road, Charlton

item.title: Selective parking enforcement, 10th March
item.description:
Ongoing daily selective parking enforcement in this location. Please investigate and provide a clear explanation.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rotherhithe New Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bus shed and concrete wall adjacent at Stop D, 10th March
item.description:
Orange tags on the bus shelter and concrete wall. There is also some white graffiti next to the orange 🧡. It is at Stop D by Abbey Wood Station.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harrow Manorway, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Dumping starting again, 10th March
item.description:
Dumping of bags on pavement starting again, accompanied by loud banging of bins at 5am

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Graces Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 50 Well Walk, 10th March
item.description:
The kerbstone has been dislodged and is dangerous.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Well Walk, Belsize Park, Greater London

item.description:
This single bed frame was dumped on Delafield Road a few days ago

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Delafield Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Human excrement, 10th March
item.description:
Bad diarrhoea on walls and used paper close by

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Orient Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Smashed ceramic sink, 10th March
item.description:
Opposite 97 Powerscroft Rd, E5.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Powerscroft Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bicycle taking up bike rack space outside Caledonian Road station on Caledonian Road N7, 10th March
item.description:
Abandoned and stripped bicycle taking up bike rack space outside Caledonian Road tube station. Not moved for about 2 years and has dangerous sharp edges. Please remove so bike rack space is available again.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 467, Caledonian Road, Holloway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Other of Chichester Road and Cambridge Gardens, 10th March
item.description:
An abandoned sofa - overnight on Monday 10th March.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chichester Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Graffiti on lamp post, 10th March
item.description:
Black pen tags on grey lamp post, asset Id: L11 9

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Lennard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road is in poor condition, 10th March
item.description:
The section of the road is in poor condition with many cracks and potholes. This present danger to the vehicles and pedestrian alike.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 72A, Sherwood Park Avenue, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Park building needs repair, 10th March
item.description:
As a regular user of Kelsey Park with my husband at least 2/3 times a week, this area of the park where we used to sit & have a rest out of the sun has been shut off for sometime now. We found out last week by another park user that 2 youths possibly from local school rammed 2 shopping trolleys over the roof & broke the tiles, deeming the building unsafe!! We are very grateful for all the hardwork, with the de silting and now lovely new bridge ( at last) but please ensure this area is made safe by summer for park users - thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelsey Park Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Plastic crate dumped, 10th March
item.description:
Someone has left a broken black plastic crate (for holding bottles) in the empty tree pit here on Lennard Rd.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small table and lamp, 10th March
item.description:
More wasted dumped on street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Versailles Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bags and furniture, 10th March
item.description:
Black bags and old furniture has been dumped at the front of the property

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wansey Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
